data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. ZANTHRON drew wide last time and was safely held when finishing seventh of 11 over this course and distance. Has the pace to settle in the leading division and is in the mix. 10. ALAA PLENTY had been racing in top form, winning two straight then finishing third of 11 over 1100m at this track after having made a poor beginning. Well worth considering. 11. DOBBINAIR has been well supported in his last two starts since resuming from a spell but hasn't fired, last start running sixth at this track. Fitter and rates well as a strong each-way chance. 15. OMAHA DAWN bounced back to winning form at Morphettville Parks last start and rates a chance in this field.","runners":[3,10,11,15],"exclusive":true}
